acquisition method: lactylome profiling was performed using LC-MS/MS in data-independent acquisition (DIA) mode.
cleavage agent: Trypsin/P was specified with two missing cleavages.
collision energy: HCD was employed with a normalized collision energy of 30%.
enrichment method: Lactylated peptides were enriched with anti-L-Lactyl Lysine antibody-conjugated agarose beads.
fragmentation method: HCD was employed with a normalized collision energy of 30%.
instrument: analyzed by LC-MS/MS using an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer.
labeling: lysine lactylation proteome analysis of human sperm identified 220 lactylated proteins enriched in glycolytic pathway and sperm motility.
